---
name: Support Request
about: Need help with something but not sure if it's a bug? Start here.
title: "[Help]: "
labels: ["question"]
---

> ⚠️ **Before you submit:** Please do not include personal data, passwords, recovery phrases, backup passwords, or any credentials in this issue. This is public — anyone can see it. If you're not comfortable posting your question publicly, email {{PLACEHOLDER: support email}} instead — that works just as well.

## What do you need help with?

Describe what you're trying to do, or what's confusing or not working as you expected. No need to know whether this is "really" a bug — that's okay, we'll help figure it out.

## What have you already tried?

If you checked the [help articles](https://help.p3.app/help) or [documentation](https://help.p3.app/docs) already, let us know — saves us pointing you back to something you've already read.

## Anything else that might help us understand?

Screenshots, what device/browser you're using, anything that feels relevant.
